summary: The user sought advice on photo-etching techniques for their new 1/72 scale B-29 bomber model kit and discussed their recent acquisition of a 1/24 scale '69 Camaro model. They also inquired about painting with Vallejo acrylics, alternative adhesives to super glue for attaching photo-etched parts, and techniques for adding wire details to both models.
facts: The user purchased a 1/72 scale B-29 bomber model kit and a 1/24 scale '69 Camaro model at a model show last weekend. The user plans to use Vallejo acrylics for painting the B-29 model. The user has experienced issues with super glue in the past and is looking for alternative methods to attach photo-etched parts. The user is considering adding wire details to their B-29 model and is seeking tips on bending and shaping wire for model building. The user is also planning to work on engine wiring and fuel lines for their '69 Camaro model.
